pages.raw_text:
facts as stated by the four men show
that they had no opportunity of any
kind to work.


In passing sentence the court said
he had no doubt but that fraud was
practiced and that the men were sent
out on a wild goose chase. He stated
that Laming had ample opportunity
to make amends and settle with the
men, but the facts showed that he
had not even offered to return to
them their fees.


City Attorney Connor said: we
are going to send transcript of the
case to the council with the recon-
mendation that the license of the ii.
& II. be revoked. They have been
found guilty of fraud and should not
be allowed to continue in business"


David Herman, counsel for Laming.
gave notice of an appeal from the
decision of the court.
